name: apiforge-mcp
description: AI APIs & Postman MCP: the craft of calling, testing, and automating APIs — AI/LLM endpoints especially. API fundamentals (HTTP/REST, auth with keys/bearer/OAuth, rate limits/retries/pagination, JSON payloads), Postman (collections, environments/secrets, tests & pre-request scripts, mocks/monitors, the CLI/Newman, the 2026 AI features), and AI/LLM APIs (calling them, streaming/SSE, reliability, testing non-deterministic endpoints, webhooks/async). explain_topic/how_to/debug/myth_vs_reality plus check_practice → practice_verdict. Owns the HTTP/testing craft; defers FM-integration architecture to aiforge, OpenAI-specific primitives to openai, prompt content to promptcraft. Runs as an asset under orchestrator-mcp.
